scope: The autonomous loop (run.RunParallel) finds its tracks and correctly detects shared touchpoint files across tracks for any current-format (board.json-backed) release instead of hard-erroring 'no tracks found' or silently disabling the shared-file invariant; and Rule 8's RTM carries the real release benefit/org objective from board.json instead of empty strings.

test_results.command: gofmt -l internal/run/parallel.go internal/run/parallel_test.go internal/run/cold_start_test.go internal/rtm/rtm.go internal/rtm/rtm_test.go internal/router/router_test.go

reachability_artifacts: docs/release/2026-07-01-render-drift-reconciliation/S06-core-loop-and-rtm-oracle-migration/reachability-runparallel-output.txt — captured output of TestRunParallel_AC06_RealReleaseBoardResolvesTracks: RunParallel against THIS repo's live 5-track board.json (isolated temp workspace, pausing router) logs 'sworn run --parallel: loaded 5 tracks in 1 phases' and never 'no tracks found', with zero side effects on real worktrees (AC-06, Coach-ratified option (a)).
delivered: AC-01: RunParallel resolves tracks via board.ReadBoard (the oracle) instead of board.ParseTracks(extractFrontmatter(index.md)); no 'no tracks found' error for a board.json-backed release. Evidence: internal/run/parallel.go (board.ReadBoard + trackInfosFromBoardTracks), TestRunParallel_AC06_RealReleaseBoardResolvesTracks ('loaded 5 tracks'), and all existing TestRunParallel_* still green through the lazy-migration path.

AC-02: extractReleaseWorktreePath is deleted; RunParallel reads br.ReleaseWorktreePath from board.json and the cold-start default fires only when board.json records no path (not unconditionally). Evidence: internal/run/parallel.go, TestRunParallel_Basic/_ReleaseWorktreePathMissing.

AC-03: parseDocumentedSharedFiles deleted and delegated to router.ParseDocumentedShared (>=2-checkmark inference), proven against a genuinely board.Render-produced index.md. Evidence: internal/run/parallel.go + TestInvariant2_DocumentedSharedFromRenderedBoard (asserts no INVARIANT-2 block and both tracks run; red-proof confirmed by forcing docShared=nil).

AC-04: rtm.Build reads release.vertical_trace.benefit/.org_objective from board.json via readBoardVerticalTrace (sibling of releaseDir), with the markdown parse retained as the no-board.json fallback. Evidence: internal/rtm/rtm.go + TestBuild_VerticalTraceFromBoardJSON (board.json value wins over a different index.md value; OrgObjective empty) and TestBuild_VerticalTraceLegacyFallback.

AC-05: router_test.go gains TestParseDocumentedSharedFromRenderedBoard exercising ParseDocumentedShared/parseTouchpointMatrix against a real sworn render-generated index.md (not the pre-migration 2026-06-27-conformance-foundation fixture, which TestParseDocumentedSharedFromFile still covers unchanged). Evidence: internal/router/router_test.go.

AC-06: reachability artefact captured via a Go-level run.RunParallel invocation against the live release board.json (Coach-ratified option (a)); see reachability_artifacts. Evidence: docs/release/2026-07-01-render-drift-reconciliation/S06-core-loop-and-rtm-oracle-migration/reachability-runparallel-output.txt.
AC-07: go build ./... succeeds and go test ./internal/run/... ./internal/rtm/... ./internal/router/... passes. Evidence: test_results above.
divergence: AC-06 reachability is the Coach-ratified Go-level run.RunParallel substitute (review.md 'Coach decision', option (a)), NOT the literal `sworn loop --parallel` CLI — the literal CLI would dispatch live work against sibling in-flight tracks (T2/T3) and trip swornagent/sworn#46. The substitute exercises the exact fixed logic (board.ReadBoard / trackInfosFromBoardTracks / documented-shared detection) against real board.json data.

sworn llm-check --type ac-satisfaction was not run in the implementer session (no SWORN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available); the fresh-context /verify-slice pass is the model-backed check for this slice, consistent with the sibling S04 slice. Rule 2 deferral recorded in journal.md.
